sourceOfTruth.scope: Generated inventory for production Flutter widget and widget-state classes under lib/**. Widgetbook/test scaffolds are intentionally out of scope.
sourceOfTruth.canonicalContracts: design/components/catch.components.json owns canonical global component contracts and governance metadata.
sourceOfTruth.catalog: widgetbook/lib/main.directories.g.dart is the generated review-surface inventory used to determine catalog coverage.
sourceOfTruth.privateHelperPolicy: Private helper widgets are not an allowed destination. Private widget classes must be promoted, merged into a canonical public widget, or inlined/deleted.
